title: SafeZones
description: SafeZones is a Minecraft Paper plugin that lets you create custom PvP-free regions with adjustable sizes, splash messages, and full admin control.
body:
🛡️ SafeZones

Create safe, peaceful areas in your Minecraft world where PvP is disabled, and players are greeted with custom messages when entering or leaving!

🌍 About

SafeZones is a lightweight, easy-to-use plugin for Paper, Spigot, and Purpur servers that lets you protect areas from player combat.
It’s perfect for spawn regions, marketplaces, town hubs, or any area where you want players to feel safe.

With simple commands, you can define custom regions, set their sizes, toggle messages, and control exactly how players experience your protected zones.

⚙️ Main Features

🧱 Default Spawn Safe Zone – Automatically protects your spawn area with a customizable size (e.g., 1000×1000 blocks).

🗺️ Custom Regions – Create unlimited safe zones anywhere using in-game position commands.

⚔️ PvP Protection – Prevent players from fighting within these zones.

💬 Splash Messages – Display custom text when players enter or leave a zone.

🧩 Command-Based Setup – No config editing required; everything can be done in-game.

🔄 Live Reload – Instantly reload all regions and settings without restarting the server.

💾 Persistent Storage – All safe zones are saved automatically and reload when the server starts.

🧑‍💻 Admin & Player Commands – Easy for players, powerful for server admins.

🧭 Commands
Command	Description
/sz info	Shows info about the default safe zone.
/sz pos1 & /sz pos2	Select corners for a custom region.
/sz region create <name>	Create a new safe zone region.
/sz region <name> splash <welcome> | <leave>	Set enter/leave splash messages.
/sz size <blocks>	Change the spawn safe zone size.
/sz splash <on/off>	Toggle splash messages globally.
/sz status	Check if you’re inside a safe zone.
/sz reload	Reload the plugin configuration.
🔒 Permissions
Permission	Description
safezones.admin	Allows region creation, editing, and reloads.
(none)	Everyone can use /sz info, /sz splash, and /sz status.
💡 Why Download SafeZones?

If you run a survival or SMP server, SafeZones keeps your spawn and community areas peaceful without needing large protection plugins.
It’s lightweight, beginner-friendly, and gives you total control using only a few simple commands.

⚙️ Compatibility

Minecraft Versions: 1.20 → 1.21.9

Server Loaders: Paper, Purpur, Spigot

License: MIT

Dependencies: None
